title: Introduction to Online Education & Course Planning
description:
The introduction to online education and course planning course is critical to offering and teaching a successful online course or program. Having a solid understanding of online education and learning styles including key principles and teaching strategies of online education and important lesson planning steps will get your course started in the right direction. This course covers topics such as: 
 
 
 Growth of online education factors 
 
 
 Quality of online education research 
 
 
 Various modes of online courses 
 
 
 Learning objectives for online education 
 
 
 Build your fundamentals in online learning through this introduction to online education and course planning course.
